preconditions: User is not authenticated before starting the workflow
Home page is opened in guest state within the SPA application

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state when application is launched
steps: Launch the application in a browser
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Allow the SPA Home page to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state and displays the approved guest-state Home controls without showing authenticated user information.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Person/Profile button
Observe the button state without clicking
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Back button
Observe the button state without clicking
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Notification button
Observe the button state without clicking
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Home button
Observe the button state without clicking
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home page shell controls.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Customer signup button
Observe the button state without clicking
testCases.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible and enabled for guest users.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Clean survey button
Observe the button state without clicking
testCases.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible and enabled for guest users.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Locate the Site survey button
Observe the button state without clicking
testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible and enabled for guest users.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button opens the Login page from guest Home state
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Person/Profile button
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page or Login view opens from the guest-state Home page and the transition occurs without requiring authentication first.

testCases.title: Verify clicking Customer signup navigates to the customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Customer signup button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the customer-search page from the guest Home page.

testCases.title: Verify clicking Clean survey navigates to the vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Clean survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the vehicle-survey page from the guest Home page.

testCases.title: Verify clicking Site survey navigates to the survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates to the survey page from the guest Home page.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled after navigating back from a guest-accessible feature page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Customer signup button
Use browser back navigation to return to the Home page
Locate the Home button
testCases.expectedResult: The user returns to the Home page in guest state and the Home button remains visible and enabled.
